message:
feat(core): bounded-parallelism bulkhead framework and raw-pointer syntax cleanup

Add core bounded-parallelism primitives (§1.5, bd-22n.4) implementing a
bulkhead admission control framework for internal background work. Uses
non-blocking overflow rejection (SQLITE_BUSY / FrankenError::Busy) rather
than queue-and-wait semantics to prevent cascading resource exhaustion.

Also update cache-line alignment tests in core_types.rs to use the cleaner
`&raw const` pointer syntax instead of `&x as *const _ as usize`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
